text: Bad morning. Could not get the Cato chapter to land. The index cards are strong but the structure is not there yet. Took a walk to the state park instead of forcing it.

Rough night, maybe five hours of sleep. Still got the walk in with the boys; Liam found a turtle near the mailbox. Writing this morning felt like pushing through mud, specifically couldn't get the Cato section to move.
